title: Sentry
description: Ultimate server security, available as a mod and plugin. Blocks cheating mods and the most popular hacked clients, Anti-BOT & VPN, prevents crash-items, OP Protection, and more!
body:
![Sentry Logo](https://i.imgur.com/p5JTiS0.png)

Sentry

Sentry is a 100% modular Minecraft Mod and Plugin offering advanced security modules (client blocking, item control, exploits patcher, ... and more!), real-time notifications (with external integrations (e.g., Discord)), server management tools, and more. Sentry ensures your server stays secure and efficient.

Plugin

Minecraft 1.8 - 26.2



Mod

Minecraft 1.21.11

--- # What is Sentry? Sentry is the ultimate next-generation security mod and plugin for your Minecraft server — giving you real peace of mind so you can focus on building an community instead of fighting off threats. It intelligently blocks **hacked clients** and **malicious mods**, stops **exploits**, prevents **bots** and **VPN abuse**, detects **cheaters**, and logs everything important. All of this runs **smoothly** with minimal resource usage, whether you're running a small survival world or a busy public network. # Modules Check all the **10** modules Sentry currently have. ## Hack Blocker The most recent module, adds the possibility of blocking the most popular **hacked clients** and these **cheating mods**: - Freecam - Wurst Client* - LiquidBounce* - Meteor Client - AutoClicker Mod - AutoClicker-Fabric Mod - FDP Client - Advanced XRay Mod - XRay Mod - Freecam Mod (Kapiteon) - Freecam Mod (Zergatul) - WorldTools Mod - Iris Shaders - Crystal Macro - Item Scroller - Auto Totem Mod - Silly's Auto Totem Mod - Cheat Utils - SeedCrackerX - Xenon Client This module is the only one that requires **Sentry Prime**! More information at the bottom of the page. ## Client Blocker Sentry can **block** any player trying to join your server using any of the **listed clients and mods** below. - JourneyMap - Forge - Fabric - NeoForge - Vanilla - World Downloader - Badlion Client - Better Sprinting Mod - Lunar Client - LabyMod - 5zig - ModernFix - Curios - AppleSkin - Rift - Configured Mod - Fast Workbench - Caelus - Placebo - Marlow's Crystal Optimizer If you’re looking for even more options, **Sentry Prime** includes experimental features that expand compatibility and control, covering a wide range of clients and mods such as Essential, Distant Horizons, Jade, Xaero’s Minimap, and many more! It also gives access to the **Hack Blocker** module. ## Anti-BOT Sentry also offers a brand new module, the **Anti-Bot**! It does as the name says, detects **unusual amounts** of connections on your server and **blocks everything**, keeping admins up-to-date on what is happening each second. This module is **100% configurable**. As the same as the other modules, you can change the full configuration to **better fit** your server! **Not convinced**? Here is a real case scenario, with Sentry blocking **more than 5000 bots** under a minute: ## Item Control With Sentry, you can **control and block** dangerous items, like items containing unsafe Enchantment levels (above Vanilla), items with modified attributes and potions containing non-vanilla effects. ## Anti-VPN Sentry provides a free* **Anti-VPN** protection service for your server, block any players trying to evade server bans. ## Command Blocker With the Command Blocker module, you can **block any dangerous command** from players, like /plugins, /about and more! You can add **your own** commands with your own Sentry actions. ## Tab Complete Blocker With this module, you can block any commands that are shown to players when they try to view your server commands, you can **control every command** using a custom **group system**. ## Force-OP Protection Sentry blocks any **unauthorized** players from obtaining OP. This module is extra useful for Creative mode servers, where players **might exploit game features** like signs to gain OP. When using this module, players **must be** explicitly added to a whitelist inside the plugin to be OP. ## IP Whitelist With this module, you can **whitelist or blacklist** any players from joining the server based on IPs instead of usernames, providing **extra security** for your server. ## Security Patches Sentry also provides a lot of security patches and **miscellaneous** protections to your server, adding extra **layers of protection** on everything. ## Lockdown Protection Sentry also provides a new feature for your server called Lockdown, with just one single command you can entirely prevent players from joining in the server temporarily. ## ... and more! Sentry is constantly evolving with updates that bring new features, essential patches, and significant improvements. Helping server owners from the entire world. --- ## Check out Sentry in action! --- # Sentry Prime Standard Sentry already offers a wide range of powerful features, but with **Sentry Prime** you unlock the full experience. **Sentry Prime** introduces **advanced** and **experimental** features, including the ability to block these popular mods: **Distant Horizons, Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map, Just Enough Items, Simple Voice Chat, Jade** and **Essential Mod**. (and of course, supports the plugin development!) --- ## Version compatibility ### Plugin Sentry is compatible with Folia, Spigot, Paper (and any other forks) servers running versions from **1.8** to **26.2**. ### Mod Sentry is compatible with FabricMC servers, running 1.21.11. Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and at least Fabric Loader 0.18.3. --- ## Support my work You can support me by getting [Sentry Prime](https://squareplugins.gitbook.io/sentry/prime), or by donating through any of the links below!
---
